name: test-submission
description: Collect one product-material submission, preview it through the locked product-release-gate core, and send a fail-closed submission request through IMAP/SMTP.

interface.longDescription: Use one credential-free configuration and one controller across MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and an unattended retry scheduler. Every submission must explicitly choose a module and produces a signed machine block for the gate service.
defaultPrompt: Run test submission setup with zero manual JSON editing.
Submit one explicit kernel, client, or server package to the submission gate mailbox.
Retry any pending submission mail and show local status.
Diagnose dependency lock, mail account, and shared gate preview readiness.
